name: Red Balloon 110pcs, Red Latex Balloons12 inch for Birthday Valentine's Day Wedding(with 2 Ribbons).
bullets: Join us you will get our toys games party supplies red decorations Balloons - 110pcs 12 inch red baloons and 2 rolls of ribbons in random colors.

Red 12 inch balloon is made of thickened latex, thicker than the normal 12inch balloons,which are durable and safe to be used. the color is bright red, .these red balloons can be used as balloons decorations for birthday party, and play around children.

Wide applications red latex balloon 12 inch are Perfect for making balloon arches, balloon clusters on birthday party, these globos rojos are widely used in balloon columns, bridal shower,baby shower,gender reveal party,Halloween, Christmas Party.

The 12 inch Red Latex Party Balloons included in the package can make your Party Decoration such as Birthday Party, Baby Shower,Wedding, Halloween or Christmas Party, etc. have enough Red Balloons to decorate.

Choking Hazard - Children Under 8 years old Children can choke or suffocate on uninflated or broken balloons. Adult supervision is required.Clean broken balloons at once. To avoid bursting, please do not overfill. Please avoid overheating, or sharp stuff.

reviews.name: Dawn rays
reviews.title: Super great balloons!
reviews.body: The balloons were amazing! The colors were vibrant, they arrived in perfect condition, and they stayed inflated for a long time. They made my event look beautiful and everyone complimented the decorations. Great quality for the price

reviews.title: Very high quality black balloons
reviews.body: Very sturdy and has a natural shine to them. I did not have to use the extra shine they are big and beautiful

reviews.title: Beautiful color
reviews.body: Loved these balloons, pretty color, great quality, and worked well for balloon arch
